purpose: Promote measured opening-board motion targets for the live starfield and the visible bottom-pass-through to top-reentry threat so those surfaces are guarded with the same durability as the rack-march pass.

primarySourceWindow.summary: Use the promoted Nenriki wrap-return window as the baseline for continuous lower-field threat, visible bottom exit, and top re-entry that reads as part of the same pressure loop.

expectedRuntimeRead: the starfield should look alive before the first dive pressure arrives
bottom-pass-through threat should reappear clearly from above the board instead of snapping back in place
wrap-return pressure should stay part of the same opening board grammar as the shared rack march
